headline: Fed minutes reveal no urgency to cut rates in Q1 2025
summary_text: Minutes from the December FOMC meeting published on January 15 showed officials broadly agreed that there was no reason to lower the federal funds rate until inflation data showed sustained progress toward the 2% target.
alert_reason: FOMC minutes directly influencing rate expectations is a high-importance event for finance audiences.

headline: S&P 500 falls 1.2% as rate-cut hopes fade
summary_text: US equities declined sharply after the Fed minutes were released, with the S&P 500 closing 1.2% lower and rate-sensitive sectors such as real estate and utilities leading losses.
alert_reason: A 1.2% index decline driven by a clear macro catalyst is alert-worthy for the finance audience.

headline: US dollar index hits two-month high after Fed signal
summary_text: The DXY dollar index climbed to its highest level in two months as traders repriced rate expectations, with EUR/USD briefly dipping below 1.09.
alert_reason: Currency move is notable but secondary to the equity and rate story already alerted.
